positive: A minimalistic, abstract representation of a vibrant forest in a stylized, geometric silhouette. The main subjects are several overlapping, stylized leaves and delicate branches, rendered in deep emerald greens, teal blues, and burnt orange. The composition is centered and highly symmetrical, designed to wrap around apparel. Utilize a strong negative space contrast against a clean white or pale beige background. The style should be clean vector illustration with the texture of screen printing on cotton fabric, emphasizing crisp edges, bold color blocking, and a harmonious, cyclical pattern. Inspired by Art Nouveau and mid-century modern folk art. Flat lighting, high contrast, print-ready vector art.
